known_vulnerable_models.description: Prompt injection vulnerability in llama.cpp GGUF loader allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary instructions via crafted model metadata.
Insecure deserialization in GPT4All model loader permits privilege escalation through malformed .bin model files.
Unvalidated model file paths in Ollama runtime allow directory traversal attacks when loading locally cached models.
Memory buffer overflow in llama.cpp inference engine when processing extremely long context windows in CodeLlama variants.
LM Studio REST API exposed on 0.0.0.0 without authentication, allowing unauthenticated inference requests from local network.
